weapons.name: Holy Orb
weapons.abilities: Ammunition(1), AT(2), Explosive, Haywire, Poison(2+), Unique

equipment.name: Ancient breviary
equipment.desc: If the model attempts to use a prayer, the roll is automatically successful.

equipment.name: Cacodominus skull
equipment.desc: The model can dispel 1 psychic power per battle round like a psyker.

equipment.name: Cenobite servitor
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +1" Movement and the "Blind Rage" ability.

equipment.name: Crusade of Wrath
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +1 Strength. Unique.

equipment.name: Crusader seals
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit can reposition up to 6" after a close combat.

equipment.name: Holy relic
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit receive a +5 bonus to all combat results and the "Fearless" ability while engaged in melee. Unique.

equipment.name: Indomitable Will
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated. 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound.
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Noctilith weapon
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Righteous Fury
equipment.desc: If the model or its attached unit suffers a wound loss in ranged combat, all models gain +1 attack, as well as the "Counter-attack" and "Furious Charge" abilities until the end of the current battle round.

equipment.name: Blessed hull
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers within 18" suffer a -1 penalty to casting psychic powers.

equipment.name: Blessed hull
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers within 18" suffer a -1 penalty to casting psychic powers.
